chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 709 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.2933/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 03.04.2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation received. On the last date of hearing i.e. 12.04.2024 Counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court as to the maintainability of instant Petition. Thereafter, none has appeared to address the question of maintainability. The conduct of petitioners and their counsel prima facie suggests that they have lost interest to pursue the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
